race.description: The Race Against Suicide Mdn Hcp
race.comment: DANCE WITH DESTINY (4) progressing well after finishing sixth in the G1 ATC Oaks three starts back. Three weeks between runs when she loomed strongly to finish a gritty second over 2200m at Newcastle. Blinkers come off and expected to shed her Maiden tag. THINK I WILL (7) fourth-up for this and will benefit with the blinkers going on today. Came out quickly and was a spent force in the straight when fifth over 1850m at Newcastle. Finds an easier race and caught the eye here two-back. TIME FOR SNOW (3) finished runner-up at all five runs this time in and stays in the mix after finishing second over 1900m at Canberra Acton in C1 grade. Each way contender. TRAGEDIES (13) just under a month between runs when she got out of her ground late in the heavy going before making a little ground late when seventh over 1600m at Nowra. Fitter now with the key jockey change. Place best.
